_meta.document: AutoVerse WhatsApp Business API — Template Submission Payloads
notes: Submit ALL templates before go-live. Meta approval: instant to 24h per template.
Category UTILITY: transactional messages (order updates, account info). No promotional language.
Category MARKETING: promotional messages (new arrivals, offers). Higher cost per conversation.
All UTILITY templates include footer: 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe'
Variables use {{N}} notation (1-indexed integers), NOT named variables like {{name}}.
example.body_text is REQUIRED for all templates with variables — Meta rejects without it.
IMAGE header requires an uploaded media handle. Use Meta's resumable upload API first.
Bangla templates use language code 'bn'. Same template name works for both languages.
Submit en version first; submit bn version as a separate POST with same name + language: 'bn'
Template name rules: lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only. Max 60 chars.
After approval: templates are referenced by name in send API calls.
WABA Tier 1 allows 1,000 business-initiated conversations/day. Apply for Tier 2 early.
priority_order: lead_instant_reply — CRITICAL: Day 0 auto-reply. Submit first.

templates._purpose: Day 0 instant reply — sent within 60 seconds of new marketplace/website enquiry

components.text:
Hi {{1}}! I'm {{2}} from {{3}}.

Thank you for your interest in our {{4}} {{5}} {{6}} at {{7}}.

Here's the full listing with photos:
{{8}}

Shall I arrange a viewing for you? What's a convenient time?
Reply STOP to unsubscribe from messages

হ্যালো {{1}}! আমি {{2}}, {{3}} থেকে বলছি।

আমাদের {{4}} সালের {{5}} {{6}} সম্পর্কে আপনার আগ্রহের জন্য ধন্যবাদ। মূল্য: {{7}}।

গাড়িটির সম্পূর্ণ বিবরণ ও ছবি দেখুন:
{{8}}

আপনি কি দেখতে আসতে চান? কখন সুবিধাজনক হবে?
বার্তা বন্ধ করতে STOP লিখে পাঠান

Any questions I can help with?

We can arrange a test drive this week. What day works for you?

templates._purpose: Day 7 urgency message — sent 168 hours after Day 0 if no reply AND lead is not cold
templates._trigger: automation sequence step 4 (condition: no_inbound_message_since_step_1 AND lead_priority != cold)
templates._approval_note: Do NOT mention 'another buyer' if it's not true. Meta flags misleading urgency. Phrase as 'high demand' instead.

If you'd like to secure it, let me know today and I'll reserve it for you.

components.text:
🚨 Final warning, {{1}}.

Your AutoVerse {{3}} subscription will be suspended on {{2}} if payment of {{4}} is not received.

After suspension: your listings will be hidden and you will not receive new leads.

Pay now to stay active: {{5}}
Reply STOP to unsubscribe from messages

🚨 সর্বশেষ সতর্কতা, {{1}}।

{{4}} পরিশোধ না হলে {{2}} তারিখে আপনার AutoVerse {{3}} সাবস্ক্রিপশন স্থগিত হবে।

স্থগিত হলে: আপনার সব লিস্টিং লুকিয়ে যাবে এবং নতুন লিড পাবেন না।

বার্তা বন্ধ করতে STOP লিখে পাঠান

step1_upload_media.title: Step 1: Upload Vehicle Photo Sample for IMAGE Headers
step1_upload_media.description: Templates T01 and T10 use IMAGE headers. Before submitting, upload a sample vehicle photo to Meta and get a media handle.
notes: Use a clean, professional vehicle photo — this is shown to Meta reviewers
The handle from this upload is used in example.header_handle
The actual message sends the vehicle's real photo — not this sample
Minimum image size: 800×418px (1.91:1 ratio for landscape)

step2_submit_en_templates.title: Step 2: Submit all 16 English templates
step2_submit_en_templates.body: Use each payload_en object from templates array above
step2_submit_en_templates.order: Submit in the priority_order listed in _meta section
notes: Submit one at a time. Do not batch.
Check status after each: GET https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/{waba_id}/message_templates?name={template_name}
Status values: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, PAUSED, DISABLED
Approval time: typically instant to 24 hours
If REJECTED: check rejection_reason field and fix before resubmitting

step3_submit_bn_templates.title: Step 3: Submit all 16 Bangla templates
notes: Same template names as English — language field differentiates them
Meta treats each language as a separate template variant
Submit all Bangla versions after English approvals
Bangla templates may take longer to review (less common language)

step4_verify_all_approved.title: Step 4: Verify all templates approved before go-live
step4_verify_all_approved.go_live_condition: All 32 templates (16 en + 16 bn) must have status = APPROVED

PROMOTIONAL_CONTENT_IN_UTILITY_TEMPLATE.symptom: Template rejected for containing promotional language
PROMOTIONAL_CONTENT_IN_UTILITY_TEMPLATE.fix: Remove promotional language. Utility templates must be transactional only.

VARIABLE_FORMAT_INVALID.fix: Variables must be {{1}}, {{2}} etc. Named variables like {{name}} are NOT supported.

MISSING_EXAMPLE.fix: Every {{N}} variable needs a corresponding example in example.body_text array.

FOOTER_REQUIRED.fix: All templates must include footer: 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe from messages'

BUTTON_TEXT_TOO_LONG.fix: Quick reply button text: max 25 characters. URL button text: max 25 characters.

INVALID_LANGUAGE_CODE.fix: Use 'bn' not 'bn_BD'. Meta uses 'bn' for Bengali.

IMAGE_HANDLE_EXPIRED.fix: Media handles expire after 30 days. Re-upload sample image and resubmit.

sending_api_reference.description: How to send an approved template via the Graph API

error_handling.190: Token expired — refresh system user token immediately
error_handling.131030: Template not approved yet — check status before sending
error_handling.131047: Re-engagement window expired (>24h since last user message) — can only send templates
error_handling.131056: Business-initiated conversation limit reached — daily tier limit hit
error_handling.100: Invalid parameter — check variable count matches template definition

waba_tier_upgrade_guide.how_to_upgrade: Tiers are earned automatically — NOT purchased
waba_tier_upgrade_guide.tier_2_requirement: Send 1,000+ business-initiated conversations in a rolling 30-day period WITH quality rating MEDIUM or HIGH
waba_tier_upgrade_guide.recommendation: Start sending Day 0 auto-replies immediately after WABA activation. This builds conversation volume for tier upgrade. Target Tier 2 by Month 3.
